title: PORT ENGINEER
description:
Job Description & Responsibilities:

1. Perform maintenance, repairs andsupervision jobs on board Evergreen Line’s fleet.

2. Responsible for handling of all work instructions from headquarter in Taiwan including maintenances, repairs, supplies, inspections, audit and survey.

3. Quote and purchases ships spare parts.

4. Onboard inspection of equipment to improve fleet management.

5. Develop and establish local contractors in Singapore and Malaysia and coordinate arrangements for repairs.

6. Liaise with Classification Societies (ABS,NK,LR,RINA etc) Flag State (Panama, Singapore, UK) Maritime and Port Authority (MPA) and Port of Singapore Authority (PSA).

7. Develop, manage and audit local vendors and suppliers in Singapore and Malaysia.

8. Undertake all kinds of urgent cases and on site attendance.

Requirements:

1. Educational Qualification – Degree in Marine Engineering.

2. Chief engineer officer of seagoing ships power by main propulsion machinery of 3,000 KW power of at least 10 year experience.

3. Superintendent engineer of container ships with minimum 10 year experience.

4. Good command of written and spoken English and Chinese is essential for preparation of reports in Chinese to Headquarters

5. Highly motivated and ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines

6. Excellent time management and work independently.

7. Good communication skills, initiative and ability to multi-task

8. Proficient in MS office applications

postedCompany.description:
Evergreen Marine (Asia) Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-flag container shipping company with headquarters in Singapore. Established in March 22, 2021, wholly owned by Evergreen Marine Corporation (Taiwan) Ltd., a public listed company in Taiwan.

Evergreen Marine (Asia) Pte. Ltd. market its global container services under the brand name ‘Evergreen Line’, together with Evergreen Marine Corp.(Taiwan) Ltd., Evergreen Marine (Hong Kong) Ltd., Italia Marittima S.p.A. and Evergreen Marine (Singapore) Pte. Ltd., as one of the world’s leading transportation giant. In addition to this, the company is responsible for developing new markets in The Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership (RCEP) countries. RCEP-a free trade agreement between the Asia-Pacific nations that account for 30 percent of the global economy, and 30 percent of the global population.

Evergreen Marine (Asia) Pte. Ltd. presently plans to time charter in seventeen (17) container vessels, with a total capacity of 134,220 TEUs. The company is responsible for developing new markets where ships hub in Singapore and in surrounding RCEP countries. The company is further investigating new regional/feeder services and alliances with other carriers in order to strengthen Evergreen Line’s ability to provide an improved range of services to its customers.
postedCompany.name: EVERGREEN MARINE (ASIA) PTE. LTD.
